system.flavor: You make the sign of an astral seal, blasting away all malice.
system.effect:
Effect 1 piercing damage to a foe in range, brand them, and push them 1d3.
Effect that foe then inside one of your zones or auras, they explode for a burst 1 (self) area effect, dealing 2 or (5+)1d3+1 damage to your target foe and all foes in the area, and pushing all other foes 1 or (5+) 2 spaces away from your target foe.
